title: More Colorful
description: More Colorful is a mod that aims for expanding vanilla, improving players' quality of life and making Minecraft world more colorful.
body:
Hello there! Do you feel that vanilla has been a bit boring? Wanna start a new adventure or try new things? Then, you came the right place! **More Colorful** is a mod that adds various stuff, ~~including beautiful furniture and decorations, intersting tools and utilities, splendid and colorful new biomes and structures and challenging monsters, even mini-bosses!~~ _(This is just a beta version, all above are just future plans)_

So far, the mod has added some musical instruments. You can learn more in the changelog.

However, you can still enjoy the mod! Thanks for playing!
